message:
🐛 Fix Copilot login check in DCO workflow (#119)

The PR author login is 'app/copilot-swe-agent' not 'copilot-swe-agent[bot]'.
Use contains() for more flexible matching.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,8 @@ on:
 jobs:
   copilot-dco:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    if: github.event.pull_request.user.login == 'copilot-swe-agent[bot]'
+    # Check for Copilot: 'app/copilot-swe-agent' or 'copilot-swe-agent[bot]'
+    if: contains(github.event.pull_request.user.login, 'copilot')
     steps:
       - name: Set DCO status for Copilot
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
